rationale: The cited paper is referenced in the Results section as the source of the spotlight method used for follow-up tests of an interaction (task type x labor-attribute condition). This is not a generic background citation; it directly supports how the authors run and justify a key inferential step. Even though it appears once, it has a clear methodological function tied to interpreting the reported effects.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Irwin and McClelland (2001) as methodological guidance for probing interaction effects via spotlight analyses in Study 1. The cited work informs the specific follow-up statistical procedure used to interpret conditional effects.
